sinks.expression: printf( '<input class="dsm-shortcode-input" type="text" readonly onfocus="this.select()" value="%s" style="width:100%%" />', $shortcode )

printf( '

Goodness! Either you do not have Divi installed or your PHP version is either too old or not recommended to use Divi Supreme! ', esc_url( 'https://wordpress.org/about/requirements/' ), PHP_VERSION )
